description_long: This is a full-sized baseball glove made primarily of tan and dark brown leather, featuring a robust and well-stitched construction. The glove has a closed basket webbing pattern at the pocket, providing a deep and secure catching area. There are four distinct finger stalls, each padded and separated by reinforced lacing, with the thumb and pinky stalls slightly more pronounced. Prominent cross-lacing is visible along the webbing, finger stalls, and perimeter, contributing to the glove's durability and flexibility. A brand logo patch is present on the back of the glove near the wrist, with additional branding stamped into the leather. The wrist strap is open, with visible lacing for adjustment, allowing for a snug fit around the wrist.
description: A tan and dark brown leather baseball glove with closed basket webbing, four padded finger stalls, and prominent cross-lacing. Features a visible brand logo patch and an open, adjustable wrist strap.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the glove's thickness, lacing along the edge, and the curvature of the finger stalls.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the four finger stalls, brand logo patch, and the overall padding and stitching.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the closed basket webbing and the depth of the pocket area.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying both the webbing and the brand logo, as well as the intricate lacing and wrist opening.
attribute_finger_stalls: Four finger stalls and one thumb stall, each padded and separated, with reinforced lacing between them; stalls are rounded and contoured for finger placement.
attribute_lacing_style: Cross-laced pattern is prominent on the webbing, finger stalls, and perimeter, with dual-lacing reinforcing the edges and pocket.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo patch with a stylized 'M' is visible on the back of the glove near the wrist, in yellow and black on a red and blue background.
attribute_wrist_strap_design: Open wrist strap with visible leather lacing for manual adjustment; no Velcro or buckle mechanism is present.
